# CrftdWeb

> Custom-coded web design agency building high-performance, conversion-focused websites for ambitious businesses. Hand-built in Next.js. Delivered in 14 days.

## What we do
- [Services](https://www.crftdweb.com/services): Custom web design & development for UK businesses
- [Web Design for Restaurants](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/web-design-for-restaurants): Booking systems, menus, local SEO
- [Web Design for Dentists](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/web-design-for-dentists): Patient booking, treatment pages, GDPR-compliant
- [Web Design for Salons](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/web-design-for-salons): Booking integration, galleries, team profiles
- [Web Design for Gyms](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/web-design-for-gyms): Member sign-ups, class schedules, lead capture
- [Web Design for Estate Agents](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/web-design-for-real-estate): Property listings, valuation tools, area guides
- [Website Cost Guide](https://www.crftdweb.com/services/website-cost): Transparent pricing for custom websites

## Products
- [The Playbook](https://www.crftdweb.com/playbook): 6-stage methodology for service businesses building scalable products
- [Engine](https://www.crftdweb.com/engine): AI-powered system for coaches & agencies to launch and automate high-ticket offers

## Resources
- [Blog](https://www.crftdweb.com/blog): Case studies, guides, and insights on web design and conversion
- [Answers](https://www.crftdweb.com/answers): Direct answers to common web design questions
- [Concepts](https://www.crftdweb.com/concepts): Deep dives into web design and digital strategy
- [Glossary](https://www.crftdweb.com/glossary): Definitions of web design and development terms
- [FAQ](https://www.crftdweb.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about our services

## Company
- [About](https://www.crftdweb.com/about): Who we are and how we work
- [Work](https://www.crftdweb.com/work): Case studies and client projects
- [Changelog](https://www.crftdweb.com/changelog): What we've shipped and when
- [Contact](https://www.crftdweb.com/contact): Start a project

## Key facts
- Location: United Kingdom (serving clients worldwide)
- Tech stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Delivery: 14-day turnaround for custom websites
- Performance: 90+ PageSpeed scores guaranteed
- Email: hello@crftdweb.com
